description: Search for and compile a list of potential venues in Edinburgh with basic details
success_criterion: List of venues with names, locations, and key features is available

description: Retrieve detailed information for the top venue from the compiled list
success_criterion: Detailed venue information including address, capacity, amenities, and pricing is obtained

description: Draft a promotional flyer using the gathered venue details
success_criterion: Flyer is completed with all necessary information and formatted appropriately
